fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Identifier
fields.tooltip: Specifies a serial number for a successful credit transfer. Failed file exports are excluded from the sequence of serial numbers. For more information, see the Status field.

fields.name: Created by User
fields.tooltip: Specifies which user made the credit transfer.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the payment file export for this credit transfer. The field is read-only.

fields.name: No. of Transfers
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many credit transfers the exported file covers.

fields.name: From Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of your bank account from which the credit transfer was made.

fields.name: From Bank Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of your bank account from which the credit transfer was made.
